title: Page Sections

sub_fields.label: URL
sub_fields.name: url
sub_fields.instructions: Use a relative path (e.g. /classes/) or full URL. tel: and mailto: also supported.

sub_fields.label: Triggers pricing modal
sub_fields.name: open_modal
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. If checked, this button opens the Request-Pricing modal window.

sub_fields.label: Icon (optional)
sub_fields.name: icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional SVG icon shown before the feature title.

sub_fields.label: URL
sub_fields.name: url
sub_fields.instructions: Use a relative path (e.g. /classes/) or full URL. tel: and mailto: also supported.

sub_fields.label: Triggers pricing modal
sub_fields.name: open_modal
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. If checked, this button opens the legacy Request-Pricing modal window.

sub_fields.label: Background
sub_fields.name: background
sub_fields.instructions: Use "Navy band" for the Content w/Image (Alternate) layout — blue gradient band with the image extending above/below it. Pairs well with the mini-feature columns.

sub_fields.label: Post limit
sub_fields.name: limit
sub_fields.instructions: Use 0 to show all matching certifications.

layout_staff_grid.name: staff_grid
layout_staff_grid.label: Staff grid (team members + optional detail modal)

sub_fields.label: Photo
sub_fields.name: photo
sub_fields.instructions: Leave empty to show a "Photo not available" placeholder.

sub_fields.label: Card detail lines (optional)
sub_fields.name: details
sub_fields.instructions: Short labelled lines shown on the card, e.g. "CCO Certifications" then "ABC, ABL, ...".

sub_fields.label: Detailed bio / modal content (optional)
sub_fields.name: modal_content
sub_fields.instructions: If filled, the card becomes a button that opens a modal with this content. If empty, the card is static (no modal).

sub_fields.label: Only show classes on or after today
sub_fields.name: only_future

sub_fields.label: URL
sub_fields.name: url
sub_fields.instructions: Use a relative path (e.g. /classes/) or full URL. tel: and mailto: also supported.

sub_fields.label: Triggers pricing modal
sub_fields.name: open_modal
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. If checked, this button opens the Request-Pricing modal.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Defaults to "We Will Travel to You!"

sub_fields.label: Text
sub_fields.name: text
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Supporting paragraph. Has a default if empty.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Image shown beside the text.

sub_fields.label: Contact rows (left column)
sub_fields.name: rows
sub_fields.instructions: Each row renders as: small uppercase label, large value/link, optional note. Rows are separated by a horizontal divider.

sub_fields.label: Value link URL (optional, e.g. tel: / mailto:)
sub_fields.name: value_href

sub_fields.label: Form title (legacy, optional)
sub_fields.name: form_title
sub_fields.instructions: Legacy. Used as fallback if Form heading is empty.

sub_fields.label: Gravity Form ID
sub_fields.name: gravity_form_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. If provided and Gravity Forms is active, the form renders here; otherwise a styled fallback is shown.

description: Shared flexible-content layouts used by every page and CPT in the theme.
